label: Demo 3
title: Editorial Storyteller
description: An editorial homepage direction with atmospheric stage-glow, sparkles, tessellated class bento, and story-driven copy. Premium, character-forward, family-warm.
previewAlt: Editorial Storyteller — premium editorial homepage with stage atmosphere
notes: Single self-contained index.html. Inline CSS. Vanilla JS only (intersection-reveal, count-up, accordion). Assets referenced relative to demo folder. GHL Sites/Funnels builder can import section-by-section.
